_note: Knobs the optimizer (optimize.py / scheduled agent) tunes from accumulated data. The service reads this file live (no restart). Edit via optimization, not by hand.

zones._note: Non-overlapping zone rendering. merge keeps the higher-TF / higher-grade zone when two of the same kind overlap; max_per_side caps how many demand/supply zones are drawn (nearest-first).

partial._note: Validated partial-exit ladder. With the model-agree M5 gate: bank 1/3 at tp1_R -> move stop to break-even -> runner to 2R. tp1 SWEEP 2026-06-30 (n=41, OOS+by-dir robust): tp1=0.5 -> 75.6% net-win / expR +0.533; tp1=0.4 -> 78.0% / +0.470 (LONG 82.6%, SHORT 72.2%, both OOS halves +); tp1=0.3 -> 78.0% / +0.411. Chose 0.4 = highest win-rate that keeps PF 3.1 / expR +0.47. tp1_R is the scale-out level in R. Delete this key to revert to plain 2R.

selectivity._note: Gate for the BUY_NOW/SELL_NOW verdict — the validated ~76% operating point (10-agent matrix 2026-06-29; re-confirmed 2026-06-30 at 75.6% net-win after the live-leak fix). FAIL-CLOSED: only actionable_tf timeframes, HTF (OB-1h/FL-1h) with-trend zones with >=room_min R of clear room AND a CONFIDENT behavioural-model agreement (|p_up-0.5|>=model_tau) fire an actionable signal — a zone missing room or model confirmation is NOT counted. actionable_tf=[M5] because the partial-exit ladder was validated ONLY on M5 (M15/H1 didn't hold); tau sweep 0.05/0.06/0.07/0.08 -> 75.6/71.9/75.0/66.7%, so 0.05 stays optimal. Set require_model_agree=false to relax back to the no-model gate.

stops._note: SL geometry, learned per source/symbol by optimize.run() from MFE/MAE of resolved setups. buf_atr = breathing room beyond the zone (xATR); min_atr = floor stop distance (xATR). disabled_sources are auto-muted when their stop-rate stays high with negative expR. Delete this key to revert to hardcoded buf=0.3 / minStop.

projection_model._note: idea-2 per-TF logistic (re-weighted direction + honest abstention). Fit by backtest/fit_projection_model.py, validated out-of-time by backtest/walkforward_idea2.py. WEIGHTS kept (2026-06-30 retrain test: a fresh refit did NOT beat the model's OOS ceiling — overall ~0.49 full-cov — and collapsed the win-rate gate 41->1 signals, so weights are unchanged). TAU recalibrated from the OOS tau-curve to show the chart arrow only in its RELIABLE confidence band: M15 0.02->0.04 (acc 0.527 @ 54% cov), H1 0.0->0.08 (acc 0.51->0.53 @ 33% cov) — these TFs don't touch the M5-only win-rate gate so it's risk-free. M5 left at 0.04 (intraday direction is ~coin-flip OOS at every tau; raising it would move the gate). Remove this key to revert project() to the legacy hand-tuned score.

proj_calibration._note: Per-TF reliability calibration learned from accumulated predictions vs realized outcome (web/learning/predictions.jsonl, n=18.4k scored, 2026-06-30). The fitted logistic is OVER-confident on H1: directional accuracy by conf band was M5 0.55-0.65 -> 70-78% (well-calibrated), but H1 conf 0.65-0.70 -> 11.5% and 0.70+ -> 41.8% (ANTI-predictive, n=432). conf_cap = the confidence ceiling beyond which the model's call is unreliable; above it project() ABSTAINS (neutral, no confident arrow) instead of showing a wrong high-conf call. H1 capped at 0.65; M5/M15 left effectively uncapped (calibrated). Re-measure and raise a cap if a TF's high-conf band recovers. Remove this key to disable calibration.

swing_model._note: per-TF swing-reach (ATR units): median forward reach up/dn + turn-bar fraction over H=48. Drives the projection arc amplitude + peak so the counter-swing is drawn at its REAL ~3 ATR size (legacy draw was a fixed 0.42 ATR, ~7x too small). Fit + leave-symbols-out validated by backtest/fit_swing_model.py (conditioning on features did not beat the median, so constants ship). Remove this key to revert the draw to 0.42*ATR.

swing_trade._note: VALIDATED projection-trade geometry per TF — out-of-time (70/30 time-split) test + leave-symbols-out, from the swing-winrate-search workflow (47 agents, 2026-06-29). TP=tp_mult*favourable-reach ATR, SL=sl_mult*adverse-reach ATR. Gates (with_trend / rsi_gate / min_ts / tau) decide WHEN the high win-rate badge shows (the regime it was measured on); the projection direction itself still draws on every bar. ALL THREE TFs now carry a robust 70%+ win-rate config: M5 0.497->0.717, M15 0.509->0.776, H1 0.523->0.781 (each LOSO-confirmed). Honest caveat: M15 keeps baseline-level expR (+0.056) so it's a clean win; H1's expR thins to +0.009 (baseline was +0.086) — high win-rate but small per-trade edge. Harness: backtest/swing_trade_eval.py. Remove a TF block to hide its target/badge.
